original_title: SPRD-1323 I like the older wife before my remarriage partner ... Yuri Satsuki - Satsuki Yuri
overview: After remarriage, I thought I could do well this time, but I was sick of my wife's bad drinking habits every day. At that time, I happened to meet my ex-wife Yuri again. That day was a holiday, my wife went out, and I forcibly invited Yuri home. While sipping tea and talking about the recent situation, I remembered when I was married to Yuri. At that time, I was looking for it many times because it was a good match for my body. Suddenly, when I saw Yuri, she seemed to remember those days, and she had a slightly squirming face. I suddenly remembered. That face is the expression that Yuri was looking for. When I covered the lily, I attacked and caressed the weak part of the lily. I was irresistibly excited by the appearance of Yuri, who was reluctant to leave her body, and showed her erected lower body to Yuri. While saying that he was in trouble, he pushed open the crotch of the lily who seemed a little happy and slowly slid it in.
title: SPRD 1323
